units.title: Mathematics of Machine Learning
units.description: Linear algebra, optimization, probability theory, and statistical learning foundations for ML.

units.title: Numerical Methods and Scientific Computing
units.description: Numerical linear algebra, ODEs/PDEs, iterative solvers, and GPU-accelerated scientific computing.

units.title: Optimization and Operations Research
units.description: Linear programming, convex optimization, combinatorial optimization, and AI-based meta-heuristics.

units.title: Probability and Statistical Inference
units.description: Probability theory, Bayesian inference, hypothesis testing, and statistical computing.

units.title: Discrete Mathematics and Algorithms
units.description: Graph theory, combinatorics, algorithm design, and cryptography foundations.

units.title: Statistical Machine Learning
units.description: Regression, classification, clustering, ensemble methods, and deep learning from a statistical perspective.

units.title: Big Data Analysis
units.description: Distributed computing for statistics, Spark, probabilistic data structures, and streaming analytics.

units.title: Bayesian Methods and Probabilistic Programming
units.description: Bayesian modeling, MCMC, variational inference, and probabilistic programming languages.

units.title: Time Series Analysis and Forecasting
units.description: ARIMA, state-space models, neural forecasting, and anomaly detection in sequential data.

units.title: Causal Inference and Experimental Design
units.description: Randomized experiments, observational studies, instrumental variables, and causal ML.

units.title: Quantum Computing and Information
units.description: Quantum gates, quantum algorithms, error correction, and quantum machine learning.

units.title: Computational Physics and Simulation
units.description: Numerical methods for physics, Monte Carlo simulation, molecular dynamics, and HPC.

units.title: AI and Machine Learning for Physics
units.description: Neural networks for physics discovery, symbolic regression, physics-informed neural networks.

units.title: Computational Chemistry and Molecular Modeling
units.description: Density functional theory, molecular dynamics, force field development, and quantum chemistry.

units.title: AI for Drug Discovery and Materials
units.description: ML for molecular property prediction, generative molecular design, and high-throughput screening.

units.title: Cheminformatics and Data Analysis
units.description: Chemical data handling, SMILES/fingerprints, RDKit, and chemical database mining.

units.title: Bioinformatics and Computational Biology
units.description: Sequence alignment, genome assembly, variant calling, and bioinformatics pipelines.

units.title: Machine Learning in Biology
units.description: Deep learning for biological sequence analysis, protein structure prediction, and multi-omics integration.

units.title: Biological Data Science
units.description: Statistical analysis of biological datasets, R/Python for biology, and reproducible research practices.
